items.briefing:
Australian organisations are rapidly adopting AI tools, including newly launched OpenAI products now available locally, but security experts warn this rush is creating new risks. AI gateways — systems that connect AI tools to company data and services — can give attackers broad access if compromised, making it critical to carefully control what your AI tools can access. Meanwhile, Microsoft has patched a zero-day vulnerability, so ensure all Microsoft software is updated promptly.

On a broader note, more countries are exploring social media restrictions, which may affect how your organisation communicates online. **Practical tip:** Before connecting any AI tool to business systems or data, check with your IT team about what permissions it actually needs.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: Australian organizations face targeted CMS vulnerabilities; ACSC warns of large-scale exploitation campaign.
